summary: Open decompilation PR touching IF, MN, and TY files. The PR body claims exact-match decompilation across 6 files with 8 newly matched functions, validated by decomp-orchestrator against baseline 0b15e71345 using ninja changes_all with a clean regression report. The loaded diff shows matching-oriented source reshaping, including local lifetime/scope changes, helper inlines, casts, PAD_STACK, volatile local use, and data/string clustering in mncount and tydisplay.

key_files.role: Adjusted textlib matching in un_80303444 and un_80304D30, including direct arg0->x8 indexing, unsigned pointer/cast changes, new inline helpers for un_80304D30 data selection, control-flow restructuring, and PAD_STACK(4).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: textlib.c hunks for un_80303444 and un_80304D30
text_corpus issue_comment: new match un_80303444; improvement un_80304D30 +45 bytes

key_files.role: Matched mncount items by adding AnimLoopSettings data, helper inlines, scoped/volatile locals, string/data blob lbl_803EFB60 with offset defines, and refactoring mnCount_Create allocation/assert/archive loading flow.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c hunks for mnCount_CreateRow, mnCount_Create, lbl_803EFB60, mnCount_GetRowValue_Number
text_corpus issue_comment: mncount .data to 100%, mnCount_Create to 100%, mnCount_GetRowValue_Number to 100%, .sdata to 100%

key_files.role: Improved event menu functions by reordering JObj lookups, introducing event_gobj/page temporaries, combining input assignment, and changing casts around gm event data.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnevent.c hunks for mnEvent_8024E524 and fn_8024D864
text_corpus issue_comment: mnEvent_8024E524 +47 bytes; fn_8024D864 +49 bytes

key_files.role: Improved main menu function fn_8022AFEC with scoped temporaries for user_data and cur_menu around selection-change calls.

Improved TY display matching by adding data/string blobs and using string-base pointer arithmetic for OSReport/assert/archive public-address calls in un_8031B1FC; also reported improvements in un_8031B328 and .data/.sdata.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: tydisplay.c hunks for un_80319EF0 and un_8031B1FC; diff is truncated before full tydisplay coverage
text_corpus issue_comment: un_8031B1FC to 100%, un_8031B328 to 100%, tydisplay .data +241 bytes, .sdata +1

key_files.role: Changed TY list source; loaded diff excerpt is truncated before tylist details, but metadata and bot report show one new match and several improvements in tylist functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: un_803148E4 to 100%; un_80312904, fn_80313BD8, un_8031457C, un_80312BAC improved

what_changed: PR body claims exact-match decompilation of 6 files with 8 newly matched functions.

Automated report lists 8 new matches: mncount .data, mnCount_Create, tylist un_803148E4, mnCount_GetRowValue_Number, textlib un_80303444, mncount .sdata, tydisplay un_8031B1FC, and tydisplay un_8031B328.
Automated report lists 12 additional unmatched-item improvements across tydisplay, tylist, mnevent, textlib, mnmain, and mncount.
textlib un_80303444 removed a cached x8 local and used arg0->x8[arg0->x0] directly; adjusted unsigned pointer type and wraparound cast in cases 4/7.

textlib un_80304D30 gained inline helpers for choosing save/stat storage and testing bit flags, changed stack/indexing/control-flow shape, wrote through ((unsigned char*) un_804A26B8)[0x194], and added PAD_STACK(4).

mncount added an AnimLoopSettings array, extracted combined VS play-time access into an inline helper, moved buf1 into the time-row branch, introduced a volatile HSD_Text* local for freeing existing row value text, and changed the special character fallback string bytes.

mncount_Create was reshaped around a clustered string blob lbl_803EFB60 with offset macros, a GObj creation helper, an init-user-data helper, explicit OSReport/__assert on allocation failure, and an archive local.

mnevent introduced event_gobj and page locals, reordered lb_80011E24 calls, changed cast placement on gm_801BEB8C/gm_801BEBF8 values, and combined inputs assignment with mn_804A04F0.buttons assignment.
mnmain fn_8022AFEC introduced scoped temporaries for gp->user_data and repeated cur_menu evaluation around two selection-change calls.
tydisplay introduced string/data blobs for asset/report/assert text and rewrote some literal OSReport/HSD_ASSERT/archive calls to use symbol-plus-offset pointers.
tylist was changed, but loaded diff is truncated before its hunks; only changed-file metadata and automated report items are available for tylist.

smart_moves.text: The PR kept verification narrow and explicit in the body: applied the slice alone to baseline 0b15e71345, built with ninja changes_all, and reported 0 broken matches, 0 fuzzy regressions, and 0 metric regressions.
For mnevent and mnmain, the diff uses small scoped locals such as event_gobj, page, tmp_data, and cur_menu to alter lifetime/evaluation shape without broad structural rewrites.

For textlib un_80304D30, helper inlines isolate repeated save/stat selection and bit-test access patterns, making the matching-specific changes easier to search and review than duplicating the conditional logic at every use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: textlib.c added un_80304D30_idk, un_80304D30_48C0, un_80304D30_4B0C

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small local-lifetime and evaluation-order changes can be meaningful matching levers in menu code: this PR repeatedly uses scoped temporaries and assignment folding around globals, gobj pointers, and menu state.
Inline helper extraction can be used as a matching tactic to control repeated access shapes while keeping call sites readable, as seen in textlib un_80304D30 and mncount row-value/GObj setup helpers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: textlib.c added un_80304D30_* inline helpers
raw_diff: mncount.c added mnCount_GetCombinedVSPlayTimeValue, mnCount_CreateMenuGObj, mnCount_InitGObjUserData

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data and literal layout edits may be involved in exact-match progress, but the evidence here is mixed for general style: mncount and tydisplay add clustered string/data blobs and offset macros/pointers, while current standards treat such edits as high-risk unless section ownership evidence supports them.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c lbl_803EFB60 and offset defines
raw_diff: tydisplay.c un_803FEFF0, un_803FF01C, un_803FF074, un_804D5AA8
text_corpus issue_comment: mncount .data to 100%; tydisplay .data improved

naming_conventions.name: mnCount_* helper names
naming_conventions.observation: New mncount helpers use the existing subsystem prefix and describe narrow roles, e.g. mnCount_GetCombinedVSPlayTimeValue, mnCount_CreateMenuGObj, and mnCount_InitGObjUserData.

naming_conventions.name: address-style unknown helpers/globals
naming_conventions.observation: Unknown or weakly understood textlib and TY symbols remain address-style, e.g. un_80304D30_48C0, un_80304D30_4B0C, un_803FEFF0, and un_803FF074.

naming_conventions.name: short local role names
naming_conventions.observation: The diff uses short role locals where roles are clear or matching-sensitive, including event_gobj, page, archive, value_text, tmp_data, and cur_menu.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: textlib un_80304D30 adds PAD_STACK(4), a narrow stack-shape tactic. PR body and bot report provide regression evidence, but the loaded diff does not include local objdiff details beyond match/improvement reporting.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: clean ninja changes_all regression report

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: volatile local to steer load/store or lifetime
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: mnCount_CreateRow wraps userdata->values[visible_row] in a scoped HSD_Text* volatile value_text before HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c mnCount_CreateRow value_text volatile block

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: mnmain and mnevent add block-scoped temporaries for user data, menu kind, event gobj, and page, likely controlling register allocation/lifetime for matching.
Diff changes include unsigned int* q in textlib cases 4/7, explicit unsigned wraparound cast, and different cast placement around gm_801BEB8C/gm_801BEBF8 in mnevent.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnevent.c mnEvent_8024E524 and fn_8024D864 cast changes

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: mncount and tydisplay introduce static/global char arrays containing multiple strings and use defines or pointer offsets for assert/report/archive strings. This is evidenced as data/matching work, not a general accepted style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c lbl_803EFB60 and mnCount_* string offset defines
raw_diff: tydisplay.c un_803FEFF0/un_803FF074 and strbase offsets

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Reported GALE01 progress from 0b15e71 to b0b9afa: matched code 72.21% (+0.07%, +2740 bytes), matched data 41.78% (+0.03%, +408 bytes), 8 new matches, and 12 improvements in unmatched items.

follow_up_queries: PR 2658 tylist diff un_803148E4 un_80312904 fn_80313BD8 un_8031457C un_80312BAC
mncount lbl_803EFB60 data ownership string cluster
tydisplay un_803FEFF0 un_803FF074 string blob data ownership
mnevent event_gobj page local lifetime matching

notes: PR is OPEN with merged_at null; no merge or acceptance status is inferred.
There are no loaded human review comments and no review records; review feedback is limited to the automated bot report.
The raw diff is truncated, so tylist details and later tydisplay hunks are only partially supported by metadata and the automated report.
The PR body claims clean runner validation and exact matches; this intake records those claims as PR evidence but does not independently rerun builds or objdiff.

Some tactics shown in the diff, especially PAD_STACK, volatile locals, and string/data clustering, are matching tactics requiring evidence under current standards; they are not promoted here as broad accepted style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Scoped temporaries as narrow matching levers in MN menu functions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2658 shows scoped temporaries such as event_gobj, page, tmp_data, and cur_menu used in mnevent and mnmain matching work. Treat as a case example for local lifetime/evaluation-order tuning, not as a blanket style rule.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: improvements in mnevent and mnmain functions

accepted_candidate_records.title: Inline helper extraction used to stabilize access shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2658 adds small static inline helpers in textlib and mncount to encapsulate repeated access patterns while pursuing matches. Curate as a narrow matching case when supported by verification, not as proof that helper extraction is always original style.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text.md: exact-match and clean regression claims

source_update_candidates.title: mncount .data exact-match candidate uses lbl_803EFB60 clustered strings
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2658 reports main/melee/mn/mncount .data moving from 3.12% to 100.00%. The loaded diff shows lbl_803EFB60[0xA8] containing allocation/assert text and MenMainConCo asset strings, with offset defines used by mnCount_Create. This may be a path-specific data ownership/layout fact if later curator review confirms it in source metadata.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mncount.c lbl_803EFB60 and offset defines
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source-owned path fact about data/string layout; do not promote from PR intake alone.

source_update_candidates.title: tydisplay string/data blob candidate around un_8031B1FC
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2658 adds un_803FEFF0, un_803FF01C, un_803FF074, and un_804D5AA8 string/data symbols in tydisplay and rewrites un_8031B1FC report/assert/archive string uses through offsets. Bot report says un_8031B1FC reached 100% and tydisplay .data improved. This is a candidate for curator review of TY display data ownership and string cluster placement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: tydisplay.c added un_803FEFF0/un_803FF01C/un_803FF074/un_804D5AA8 and strbase offsets

source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source-owned data-layout/path fact; loaded diff is truncated and PR is open, so curator review is required.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider adding a case note for volatile locals and PAD_STACK evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2658 contains both PAD_STACK(4) in textlib un_80304D30 and a volatile HSD_Text* local in mnCount_CreateRow, with PR/body bot evidence of matching progress. Existing standards already say such tactics need explicit evidence; curator may decide whether this PR is worth linking as an example case after confirming final review/merge status.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: un_80304D30 and mnCount_CreateRow improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible standards example, not a new standard; existing standards already cover the rule.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that string-literal-to-global-symbol rewrites are broadly accepted style from this PR; current standards warn that data/literal ownership needs explicit evidence.
Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; PR state is OPEN and no human review comments are loaded.
Do not create tylist-specific lessons from code shape; the loaded raw diff is truncated before tylist hunks.
Do not promote PAD_STACK or volatile locals as normal cleanup. In this slice they are matching tactics with PR-level validation claims, not independently verified standards.
